name: GAP-23GENE-PROXY
verbatim_evidence: KB claim: 23-gene DDR proxy panel AUROC 0.495 (95%CI 0.386-0.602) on TCGA-OV (166pts) = RANDOM; mean scores backwards (resistant 0.238 < sensitive 0.253)
Current tier: RANDOM (not better than chance)
Zeta dataset: EGA BriTROC-1 (genomic truth) + Synapse MSK cohort.maf/cna.tsv (mutation+CNA)

attributes.role: VALIDATE (re-derive DDR panel on orthogonal genomic cohort)
attributes.how: BriTROC + MSK give independent DDR mutation/CNA profiles with platinum outcomes; re-fit or refute the 23-gene panel on non-TCGA data. If still ~0.5, panel is dead; if signal emerges, panel becomes cohort-specific.
attributes.blocker: MSK bytes blocked (invalid token); BriTROC needs HPC + clinical map.
attributes.closes_gap: PARTIAL - validation cohorts identified; access blockers apply
attributes.zeta_dataset: EGA BriTROC-1 (genomic truth) + Synapse MSK cohort.maf/cna.tsv (mutation+CNA)
attributes.kb_claim: 23-gene DDR proxy panel AUROC 0.495 (95%CI 0.386-0.602) on TCGA-OV (166pts) = RANDOM; mean scores backwards (resistant 0.238 < sensitive 0.253)
